title: Alm's Oil Additions and Compat
description: This Datapack adds recipes to the Distillery Tower from Tech reborn to guarantee more compatibility with Ad Astra, Modern industrialization and all of its fuel
body:
*   This Datapack adds 4 recipes to the Tech Reborn Distilliation Tower:
*   Tech reborn oil from ad astra oil
*   sulfuric light fuel, heavy fuel and sulfuric Naptha from oil
*   oil from seed oil from create additions
*   oil from plant seed oil from modern industrializatin

While this Datapack does nothing on its own, it requires Techreborn, Modern industrialization, Ad Astra and Create + Create additions  
Initially meant for Prominence II, feel free to use this datapack on your own, more coming recipes in the future!
